top_findings.title: Source and test files missing from archive — no src/ or test/ directories
top_findings.evidence: find -type f in run_dir shows only config/doc files (deps.edn, README.md, TASK.md, stack.json, etc.); deps.edn :paths ["src" "resources"] and :extra-paths ["test"] reference directories that do not exist in the archive
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive the run workspace to include all generated .clj source and test files

top_findings.title: POST /books — cannot verify, source absent from archive
top_findings.evidence: No src/ in archive; README.md:31 documents POST /books endpoint; test_coverage=1.0 from retort.db
top_findings.suggestion: Re-archive with source files to enable verification
